datasets.small_corpus: the dog ran . the cat sat . (repeat, 8 tokens)
datasets.extended_corpus: the dog ran/ate/sat . a cat ran . x5 (20 sentences)

key_findings: Transformer achieves lowest ppl=1.46 on small corpus
LR decay (x0.1) at ep20,25 gives significant boost for CIFAR-10
BPE: vocab=144 after 117 merges on 8-sentence x50 corpus
Seq2seq translation: 100% accuracy on synthetic JA-EN 200 pairs
BiLSTM-NER: token accuracy 100% on synthetic dataset
BERT MLM: 4/5 masked token top-1 accuracy
